## 6. Founder Paperwork Checklist

| Task | Deadline | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Delaware Articles of Incorporation filed | Formation day | [ ] |
| EIN received | Within ~4 business days | [ ] |
| Bylaws adopted (board consent) | Formation week | [ ] |
| Stock purchase agreement(s) signed | Before 83(b) deadline | [ ] |
| IP assignment (PIIA/CIIA) signed | Formation week | [ ] |
| **83(b) election filed** | **Within 30 CALENDAR DAYS of stock issuance** | [ ] |
| Initial board consent executed | Formation week | [ ] |
| Registered agent confirmed | Formation day | [ ] |
| Business bank account opened | After EIN | [ ] |
| Bookkeeping platform connected | After banking | [ ] |
